name: Hershey's Best Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large microwave-safe bowl, melt the butter by microwaving it on HIGH for 2 to 2-1/2 minutes. Stir in sugar and vanilla extract.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Mix in cocoa powder until well blended.
6. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt; stir well into the mixture.
7. Fold in chopped nuts if desired.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan.
9. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until the brownies pull away from the sides of the pan.
10. Allow cooling completely on a wire rack before cutting into bars (about 36 pieces).
